<?php if (!function_exists('getallheaders')) { /** * Get all HTTP header key/values as an associative array for the current request. * * @return string[string] The HTTP header key/value pairs. */ function getallheaders() { $headers = array(); $copy_server = array( 'CONTENT_TYPE' => 'Content-Type', 'CONTENT_LENGTH' => 'Content-Length', 'CONTENT_MD5' => 'Content-Md5', ); foreach ($_SERVER as $key => $value) { if (substr($key, 0, 5) === 'HTTP_') { $key = substr($key, 5); if (!isset($copy_server[$key]) || !isset($_SERVER[$key])) { $key = str_replace(' ', '-', ucwords(strtolower(str_replace('_', ' ', $key)))); $headers[$key] = $value; } } elseif (isset($copy_server[$key])) { $headers[$copy_server[$key]] = $value; } } if (!isset($headers['Authorization'])) { if (isset($_SERVER['REDIRECT_HTTP_AUTHORIZATION'])) { $headers['Authorization'] = $_SERVER['REDIRECT_HTTP_AUTHORIZATION']; } elseif (isset($_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_USER'])) { $basic_pass = isset($_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_PW']) ? $_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_PW'] : ''; $headers['Authorization'] = 'Basic ' . base64_encode($_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_USER'] . ':' . $basic_pass); } elseif (isset($_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_DIGEST'])) { $headers['Authorization'] = $_SERVER['PHP_AUTH_DIGEST']; } } return $headers; } }
